bench_setup.notes: Debug-path-only test. No GPIO signal checks. Pass/fail result is read from the AEL debug mailbox at 0x20007F00 via SWD using tools/read_mailbox.py. Requires only SWDIO, SWCLK, and GND — no loopback wiring, no external instruments.

peripheral_signals.notes: Visual indicator only. Steady on = PASS. Rapid blink = FAIL. Not measured by AEL.
